title: PayPal Alternatives for Nigerian Creators: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: As a Nigerian digital creator, you're no stranger to the challenges of getting paid for your work. You've probably tried using PayPal or Stripe, but those payment processors have strict rules about which countries they serve – and Nigeria isn't one of them. You're not alone; millions of creators around the world face the same problem. But what alternatives are out there? And which one is right for you? In this post, we're going to break down the options and give you the lowdown on what to expect.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to PayPal alternatives, there are a few options that come up repeatedly. One is NOWPayments, a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to accept payments in over 300 different currencies. Another is Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, a plugin that integrates with your website and allows customers to pay with their wallets. NOWPayments offers a lot of flexibility and control, but it can be overwhelming for beginners. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, is a more streamlined solution that's easy to set up and use. Both options have their pros and cons, but they're worth considering if you're looking for a PayPal alternative.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Let's talk about how each option handles countries with restricted access to payment processors. NOWPayments is transparent about which countries are supported, but the list is limited – and Nigeria isn't on it. Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, is designed to work with a wide range of countries and currencies. This means that as long as you have an internet connection, you can use Web3 Wallet Connect to sell your products to customers anywhere in the world. Whether you're in Nigeria or elsewhere, this option gives you the freedom to sell your products to anyone, anywhere.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, each option has its own strengths and weaknesses. NOWPayments offers fast payment processing, but it also charges a fee of 1.5% to 3.5% per transaction, depending on the currency and payment method. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, charges a flat fee of $19.99 per month, but it also offers faster payment processing and lower fees overall. When it comes to real costs, it's worth considering the overall value proposition of each option – and whether the fees and charges are worth the benefits you'll get.
Don't assume that every payment processor is created equal – some are more restrictive than others.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery are critical components of any payment solution. NOWPayments offers a range of automation features, including automated payment processing and delivery of digital products. Web3 Wallet Connect also offers automated payment processing, but it's designed to work seamlessly with your website and customers' wallets. This means that you can focus on creating products and selling them to customers, without worrying about the technical details of payment processing and delivery.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So which option is right for you? The answer depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're looking for a high degree of control and flexibility, NOWPayments might be the better choice. But if you're looking for a streamlined solution that's easy to set up and use, Web3 Wallet Connect is a better option. Consider your needs, and choose the option that best fits your situation.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The most common question I get is: 'Will I be able to get paid?' The answer is yes – but it depends on the option you choose. With NOWPayments, you'll need to check their supported countries list to see if Nigeria is included. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell your products to customers anywhere in the world, as long as they have an internet connection. So, can you get paid? The answer is yes – but you need to choose the right option.
When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, each option has its own strengths and weaknesses.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more information on payment processors and cryptocurrency, there are a few related topics worth exploring. You might want to check out our post on the benefits and drawbacks of using cryptocurrency for online payments. You can also learn more about Web3 Wallet Connect and how it works by visiting the Unchained Commerce website. And if you have any questions or need help setting up your payment solution, be sure to check out our support resources.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a checklist of steps to follow to set up your payment solution: 1. Choose the option that best fits your situation – either NOWPayments or Web3 Wallet Connect. 2. Set up your payment solution by following the instructions provided by the option you chose. 3. Configure your website to work seamlessly with your payment solution. 4. Test your payment solution to make sure it's working correctly. 5. Start selling your products to customers and collecting payments. 6. Monitor your payments and adjust your solution as needed to optimize your results.
Automating payment processing and delivery can save you time and hassle, but it's worth considering the overall value proposition of each option.
